questions.question: Which of the following is the highest tax slab of GST?
questions.explanation: Goods and Service Tax (GST) are divided into four different tax slabs for collection of tax i.e, 5%, 12%, 18% and 28%.

questions.question: GST is a type of which of the following?

options.label: C
options.text: It depends on the goods and services

options.label: D
options.text: It depends on the associate states

questions.explanation: Goods and Service tax is a type of indirect tax.

questions.question: What type of GST will be applicable for the Interstate supply of goods?
questions.explanation: Integrated Goods and Services Tax (IGST) will be applicable for the Interstate supply of goods.

questions.question: Who among the following was appointed the head of the first committee to design a GST model?
questions.explanation: In 1999, the Vajpayee government appointed Asim Dasgupta as the head of the first committee to design a GST model.

questions.question: What is the full form of ISD which is related to GST?
questions.explanation: ISD stands for Input Service Distributor. It is mentioned in Section 2(61) of the CGST/SGST Act.
